title: Chatting at the school gate
description: Make small talk with another parent while waiting to pick up the kids
context: School pick-up in Hong Kong is a social ritual. Parents and domestic helpers gather at the gate from around 3pm. It's a good place to hear relaxed, everyday Cantonese — gossip, homework complaints, and weekend plans.
cultural_note: Kowloon Tong has entire commercial buildings dedicated to tutoring centres (補習社, bou2 zaap6 se5). Hong Kong children routinely move from school to tutoring to music or sports practice and home past 9pm, a rhythm so normalised that the industry is worth billions. The school gate is, consequently, one of the most information-dense social nodes in the city: parents compare tutors, share results, and manage their children's academic careers in 15-minute windows.

lines.speaker: parent
lines.jyutping: nei5 go3 zai2 duk6 gei2 nin4 baan1 gaa3?
lines.english: What year is your son in?

lines.speaker: parent
lines.cjk: 我個女係小四。佢哋係同一間學校呀，可能識㗎。
lines.jyutping: ngo5 go3 neoi2 hai6 siu2 sei3. keoi5 dei6 hai6 tung4 jat1 gaan1 hok6 haau6 aa3, ho2 nang4 sik1 ga3.
lines.english: My daughter is in Primary Four. They're in the same school, they might know each other.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: hai6 lo3! nei5 go3 neoi2 giu3 me1 meng2?
lines.english: Oh really! What's your daughter's name?

lines.speaker: parent
lines.cjk: 佢叫嘉嘉。你個仔叫咩名呀？
lines.jyutping: keoi5 giu3 gaa1 gaa1. nei5 go3 zai2 giu3 me1 meng2 aa3?
lines.english: She's called Ka Ka. What's your son's name?

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 佢叫阿明。佢放學鍾意打波，你個女呢？
lines.jyutping: keoi5 giu3 aa3 ming4. keoi5 fong3 hok6 zung1 ji3 daa2 bo1, nei5 go3 neoi2 ne1?
lines.english: He's called Ming. After school he loves playing ball. What about your daughter?

lines.speaker: parent
lines.cjk: 佢學鋼琴，又要補習。而家啲小朋友真係好忙㗎。
lines.jyutping: keoi5 hok6 gong3 kam4, jau6 jiu3 bou2 zaap6. ji4 gaa1 di1 siu2 pang4 jau5 zan1 hai6 hou2 mong4 gaa3.
lines.english: She does piano, and tutoring too. Kids these days are so busy.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 係呀。好喇，啱啱見到我個仔出嚟喇。拜拜！
lines.jyutping: hai6 aa3. hou2 laa3, ngaam1 ngaam1 gin3 dou2 ngo5 go3 zai2 ceot1 lei4 laa3. baai1 baai3!
lines.english: Yes, indeed. OK, I can see my son coming out now. Bye bye!
